name: Mammy Mart Corporation
summary: Mammy Mart Corporation operates a chain of fresh food based supermarkets in Japan. As of November 2019, it operated approximately 76 stores. The company was formerly known as Iwasaki Shoji Co., Ltd. and changed to Mammy Mart Corporation in April, 1988. Mammy Mart Corporation was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Saitama, Japan.
